commands.code: var old=document.querySelector("[station-lighting]");if(old)old.parentNode.removeChild(old);AFRAME.registerComponent("station-lighting",{init(){const g=this.el.object3D;function pt(color,int,dist,x,y,z){var lt=new THREE.PointLight(color,int,dist);lt.position.set(x,y,z);g.add(lt);}function strip(w,h,d,x,y,z){var m=new THREE.Mesh(new THREE.BoxGeometry(w,h,d),new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({color:0xddeeff,transparent:true,opacity:0.08}));m.position.set(x,y,z);g.add(m);}/* Main corridor - sparse overhead fluorescents */pt(0xddeeff,0.35,4,0,2.65,-3.0);pt(0xddeeff,0.35,4,0,2.65,-5.5);/* Subtle ceiling strip indicators */strip(0.6,0.006,0.02,0,2.73,-3.0);strip(0.6,0.006,0.02,0,2.73,-5.5);/* T-junction - single overhead */pt(0xddeeff,0.4,3.5,0,2.65,-4.5);/* Right branch - one light */pt(0xccddff,0.3,3.5,2.3,2.65,-4.5);/* Server room - dim blue overhead */pt(0x8899bb,0.5,3.5,4.8,2.5,-4.5);/* Observation room - single cool white */pt(0xccddee,0.5,4,0,2.5,-8.5);/* Viewport window - faint starlight glow */var viewport=new THREE.Mesh(new THREE.PlaneGeometry(1.6,1.0),new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({color:0x0a1525,transparent:true,opacity:0.8}));viewport.position.set(0,1.5,-9.71);g.add(viewport);pt(0x334466,0.15,2,0,1.5,-9.4);}});var el=document.createElement("a-entity");el.setAttribute("station-lighting","");document.querySelector("a-scene").appendChild(el);console.log("[hot-swap] station-lighting v2 - toned down");
